headline: Is Applied Materials, Inc. (AMAT) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is AMAT a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Applied Materials, Inc. on Nikhs’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on AMAT. Applied Materials, Inc.’s share was trading at $448.25 as of May 27th. AMAT’s trailing and forward P/E were 42.17 and 38.17 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. […]
